'''wabosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:gradine|gradine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-b-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gradine|gradine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wabosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæbesheth|wæbesheth]] || [[word:wæbeshej|wæbeshej]] || [[word:wæbeshesh|wæbeshesh]] || [[word:wæbeshe|wæbeshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:waboboshoth|waboboshoth]] || [[word:waboboshoj|waboboshoj]] || [[word:waboboshosh|waboboshosh]] || [[word:wabobosho|wabobosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:waboshoth|waboshoth]] || [[word:waboshoj|waboshoj]] || [[word:waboshosh|waboshosh]] || [[word:wabosho|wabosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wabofshoth|wabofshoth]] || [[word:wabofshoj|wabofshoj]] || [[word:wabofshosh|wabofshosh]] || [[word:wabofshof|wabofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:waboshotho|waboshotho]] || [[word:waboshojo|waboshojo]] || [[word:waboshosho|waboshosho]] || [[word:waboshoko|waboshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:waboshoth|waboshoth]] || [[word:waboshoj|waboshoj]] || [[word:waboshosh|waboshosh]] || [[word:wabosho|wabosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:waboshothol|waboshothol]] || [[word:waboshojol|waboshojol]] || [[word:waboshoshol|waboshoshol]] || [[word:waboshokol|waboshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:waboshothotho|waboshothotho]] || [[word:waboshojojo|waboshojojo]] || [[word:waboshoshosho|waboshoshosho]] || [[word:waboshoko|waboshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:waboshothon|waboshothon]] || [[word:waboshojon|waboshojon]] || [[word:waboshoshon|waboshoshon]] || [[word:waboshokon|waboshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:waboshothoro|waboshothoro]] || [[word:waboshojoro|waboshojoro]] || [[word:waboshoshoro|waboshoshoro]] || [[word:waboshokoro|waboshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
